holdings.infoBox: COAL is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Warrior Met Coal stock at 11.74%, Alpha Metallurgical Resources at 7.76%, Yancoal Australia at 7.18%, Whitehaven Coal at 6.42%, and Core Natural Resources at 5.93%.

overview.description: The Range Global Coal Index ETF (COAL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the VettaFi Global Coal index. The fund is designed to replicate the performance of a market-cap weighted index comprising global stocks primarily involved in the coal industry, including those engaged in coal production and logistics. COAL was launched on Jan 23, 2024 and is issued by Range.
